question_fr: Quelles sont les 10 communes avec le plus d'erreurs d'extraction en 2023 ?
sql: SELECT d.city_name, COUNT(er.result_id) as error_count FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE er.message_error IS NOT NULL AND d.document_year = '2023' GROUP BY d.city_name ORDER BY error_count DESC LIMIT 10

question_fr: Quelle est la répartition des erreurs d'extraction par type de budget en 2024 ?

question_fr: Quelle est la répartition des documents par type de budget et par format en 2024 ?

question_fr: Quelles sont les 10 communes avec le plus de documents extraits en 2024, triées par nombre de pages ?

question_fr: Quelle est la répartition des erreurs d'extraction par type de document et par type de budget en 2024 ?

question_fr: Quels sont les 5 champs les plus fréquemment extraits pour les documents en erreur en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT er.safir_field_id, COUNT(*) as extraction_count FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id JOIN states s ON er.state_id = s.state_id WHERE s.code = 'ERROR' AND d.document_year = '2024' GROUP BY er.safir_field_id ORDER BY extraction_count DESC LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Quelle est la répartition des documents par type de budget et par format, pour les communes avec plus de 50 documents en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT d.budget_type, d.format, COUNT(*) as document_count FROM documents d WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND d.city_name IN (SELECT city_name FROM documents WHERE document_year = '2024' GROUP BY city_name HAVING COUNT(*) > 50) GROUP BY d.budget_type, d.format;

question_fr: Quelle est la moyenne de pages par document pour chaque type de budget et chaque format en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT budget_type, format, AVG(nb_pages) as avg_pages FROM documents WHERE document_year = '2024' GROUP BY budget_type, format;

question_fr: Quelle est l'évolution des dépenses d'investissement totales pour les communes de plus de 50 000 habitants entre 2023 et 2024 ?
sql: SELECT d.document_year, SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'D001' THEN CAST(er.value AS FLOAT) ELSE 0 END) AS total_investment FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id JOIN extraction_runs r ON er.run_id = r.run_id JOIN sections s ON d.document_id = s.document_id WHERE d.document_year IN ('2023', '2024') AND d.siret IN (SELECT d2.siret FROM documents d2 JOIN sections s2 ON d2.document_id = s2.document_id WHERE s2.section_value LIKE '%50 000%' AND s.section_value LIKE '%habitants%') GROUP BY d.document_year ORDER BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Quelle est la répartition des recettes de fonctionnement par type de commune (urbaine, rurale) pour l'année 2024 ?
sql: SELECT s.section_value AS commune_type, SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'RI16' THEN CAST(er.value AS FLOAT) ELSE 0 END) AS total_revenues FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id JOIN sections s ON d.document_id = s.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND s.section_value LIKE '%urbaine%' OR s.section_value LIKE '%rurale%' GROUP BY s.section_value;

question_fr: Quelles sont les 10 communes avec le taux de dette le plus élevé par habitant en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT d.city_name, (CAST(er1.value AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(CAST(er2.value AS FLOAT), 0)) * 100 AS debt_per_capita FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er1 ON d.document_id = er1.document_id JOIN extraction_results er2 ON d.document_id = er2.document_id JOIN sections s ON d.document_id = s.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND er1.safir_field_id = 'DF6611' AND er2.safir_field_id = 'POP' GROUP BY d.city_name, er1.value, er2.value ORDER BY debt_per_capita DESC LIMIT 10;

question_fr: Quelle est l'évolution des recettes fiscales pour les budgets principaux (BP) entre 2023 et 2024 ?
sql: SELECT d.document_year, SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'RI1' THEN CAST(er.value AS FLOAT) ELSE 0 END) AS total_tax_revenues FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE d.document_year IN ('2023', '2024') AND d.budget_type = 'BP' GROUP BY d.document_year ORDER BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Quelle est la répartition des dépenses de personnel par type de budget (BP, BA) en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT d.budget_type, SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'D11' THEN CAST(er.value AS FLOAT) ELSE 0 END) AS total_personnel_expenses FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' GROUP BY d.budget_type;

question_fr: Quelles sont les 5 communes avec la plus forte croissance des dépenses d'équipement entre 2023 et 2024 ?
sql: WITH yearly_expenses AS ( SELECT d.city_name, d.document_year, SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'D002' THEN CAST(er.value AS FLOAT) ELSE 0 END) AS equipment_expenses FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE d.document_year IN ('2023', '2024') GROUP BY d.city_name, d.document_year ) SELECT y1.city_name, ((y1.equipment_expenses - y2.equipment_expenses) / NULLIF(y2.equipment_expenses, 0)) * 100 AS growth_rate FROM yearly_expenses y1 JOIN yearly_expenses y2 ON y1.city_name = y2.city_name AND y1.document_year = '2024' AND y2.document_year = '2023' ORDER BY growth_rate DESC LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Quelle est la répartition des recettes de fonctionnement par source (fiscales, non fiscales) en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'RI1' THEN 'Fiscales' WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'RI2' THEN 'Non fiscales' ELSE 'Autres' END AS revenue_source, SUM(CAST(er.value AS FLOAT)) AS total_revenues FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND er.safir_field_id IN ('RI1', 'RI2') GROUP BY CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'RI1' THEN 'Fiscales' WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'RI2' THEN 'Non fiscales' ELSE 'Autres' END;

question_fr: Quelle est l'évolution des dépenses de fonctionnement pour les communes de moins de 10 000 habitants entre 2023 et 2024 ?
sql: SELECT d.document_year, SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'D1' THEN CAST(er.value AS FLOAT) ELSE 0 END) AS total_operating_expenses FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id JOIN sections s ON d.document_id = s.document_id WHERE d.document_year IN ('2023', '2024') AND d.siret IN (SELECT d2.siret FROM documents d2 JOIN sections s2 ON d2.document_id = s2.document_id WHERE s2.section_value LIKE '%10 000%' AND s.section_value LIKE '%habitants%') GROUP BY d.document_year ORDER BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Quelle est la répartition des dépenses d'investissement par catégorie (équipement, remboursement de dette) en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'D001' THEN 'Équipement' WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'D002' THEN 'Remboursement de dette' ELSE 'Autres' END AS investment_category, SUM(CAST(er.value AS FLOAT)) AS total_investment FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND er.safir_field_id IN ('D001', 'D002') GROUP BY CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'D001' THEN 'Équipement' WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'D002' THEN 'Remboursement de dette' ELSE 'Autres' END;

question_fr: Quelles sont les 10 communes avec le taux de marge budgétaire le plus élevé en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT d.city_name, (CAST(er1.value AS FLOAT) - CAST(er2.value AS FLOAT)) / NULLIF(CAST(er2.value AS FLOAT), 0) * 100 AS budget_margin_rate FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er1 ON d.document_id = er1.document_id JOIN extraction_results er2 ON d.document_id = er2.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND er1.safir_field_id = 'RI16' AND er2.safir_field_id = 'D1' GROUP BY d.city_name, er1.value, er2.value ORDER BY budget_margin_rate DESC LIMIT 10;

question_fr: Quelle est l'évolution des recettes totales pour les budgets annexes (BA) entre 2023 et 2024 ?
sql: SELECT d.document_year, SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'RI16' THEN CAST(er.value AS FLOAT) ELSE 0 END) AS total_revenues FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE d.document_year IN ('2023', '2024') AND d.budget_type = 'BA' GROUP BY d.document_year ORDER BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Quelle est la répartition des dépenses de fonctionnement par fonction (éducation, santé, etc.) en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT er.safir_field_id AS function_code, SUM(CAST(er.value AS FLOAT)) AS total_expenses FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND er.safir_field_id LIKE 'D%' AND er.safir_field_id != 'D1' AND er.safir_field_id != 'D001' AND er.safir_field_id != 'D002' GROUP BY er.safir_field_id;

question_fr: Quelles sont les 5 communes avec la plus forte baisse des recettes fiscales entre 2023 et 2024 ?
sql: WITH yearly_revenues AS ( SELECT d.city_name, d.document_year, SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'RI1' THEN CAST(er.value AS FLOAT) ELSE 0 END) AS tax_revenues FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE d.document_year IN ('2023', '2024') GROUP BY d.city_name, d.document_year ) SELECT y1.city_name, ((y1.tax_revenues - y2.tax_revenues) / NULLIF(y2.tax_revenues, 0)) * 100 AS revenue_change FROM yearly_revenues y1 JOIN yearly_revenues y2 ON y1.city_name = y2.city_name AND y1.document_year = '2024' AND y2.document_year = '2023' ORDER BY revenue_change ASC LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Quelle est l'évolution des dépenses totales pour les communes de plus de 100 000 habitants entre 2023 et 2024 ?
sql: SELECT d.document_year, SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'D1' OR er.safir_field_id = 'D001' OR er.safir_field_id = 'D002' THEN CAST(er.value AS FLOAT) ELSE 0 END) AS total_expenses FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id JOIN sections s ON d.document_id = s.document_id WHERE d.document_year IN ('2023', '2024') AND d.siret IN (SELECT d2.siret FROM documents d2 JOIN sections s2 ON d2.document_id = s2.document_id WHERE s2.section_value LIKE '%100 000%' AND s.section_value LIKE '%habitants%') GROUP BY d.document_year ORDER BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Quelle est la répartition des documents par type de budget (BP et BA) pour les communes de plus de 100 000 habitants en 2024 ?

question_fr: Quelle est l'évolution des recettes totales de fonctionnement pour les communes de plus de 50 000 habitants entre 2023 et 2024 ?
sql: SELECT d.document_year AS annee, SUM(CASE WHEN d.budget_type = 'BP' AND er.safir_field_id = 'Recettes_totales' THEN CAST(er.value AS FLOAT) ELSE 0 END) AS recettes_totales_fonctionnement, COUNT(DISTINCT d.siret) AS nombre_communes FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE d.document_year IN ('2023', '2024') AND d.city_name IN (SELECT d2.city_name FROM documents d2 JOIN extraction_results er2 ON d2.document_id = er2.document_id WHERE er2.safir_field_id = 'Population' AND CAST(er2.value AS INTEGER) > 50000 GROUP BY d2.city_name) GROUP BY d.document_year ORDER BY annee;

question_fr: Quelle est l'évolution des dépenses totales d'investissement pour les communes de plus de 50 000 habitants entre 2023 et 2024 ?
sql: SELECT d.document_year, SUM(CAST(er.value AS FLOAT)) AS total_investment_expenses FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id JOIN sections s ON d.document_id = s.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'D1000' AND s.section_value LIKE '%population%50 000%' GROUP BY d.document_year ORDER BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Quelle est la part des recettes fiscales dans les recettes totales de fonctionnement pour les budgets principaux en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT city_name, (SUM(CASE WHEN safir_field_id = 'RI01' THEN CAST(value AS DECIMAL) ELSE 0 END) / SUM(CASE WHEN safir_field_id IN ('RI01', 'RI02', 'RI03', 'RI04') THEN CAST(value AS DECIMAL) ELSE 0 END)) * 100 AS part_recettes_fiscales FROM documents JOIN extraction_results ON documents.document_id = extraction_results.document_id WHERE document_year = '2024' AND budget_type = 'BP' GROUP BY city_name ORDER BY part_recettes_fiscales DESC;

question_fr: Quelle est la répartition des dépenses de personnel par type de budget (BP et BA) en 2024 ?

question_fr: Quelles sont les 5 communes avec la plus forte croissance des recettes fiscales entre 2023 et 2024 ?
sql:
WITH recettes_fiscales_2023 AS (
    SELECT
        d.city_name,
        SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'Recettes_Fiscales' THEN CAST(er.value AS DECIMAL) ELSE 0 END) AS recettes_fiscales
    FROM
        documents d
    JOIN
        extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id
    WHERE
        d.document_year = '2023'
    GROUP BY
        d.city_name
),
recettes_fiscales_2024 AS (
    SELECT
        d.city_name,
        SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'Recettes_Fiscales' THEN CAST(er.value AS DECIMAL) ELSE 0 END) AS recettes_fiscales
    FROM
        documents d
    JOIN
        extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id
    WHERE
        d.document_year = '2024'
    GROUP BY
        d.city_name
)
SELECT
    rf2024.city_name,
    rf2024.recettes_fiscales AS recettes_2024,
    rf2023.recettes_fiscales AS recettes_2023,
    (rf2024.recettes_fiscales - rf2023.recettes_fiscales) AS croissance
FROM
    recettes_fiscales_2024 rf2024
JOIN
    recettes_fiscales_2023 rf2023 ON rf2024.city_name = rf2023.city_name
ORDER BY
    croissance DESC
LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Quelle est l'évolution des recettes fiscales par habitant pour les communes de plus de 50 000 habitants entre 2023 et 2024 ?
sql: SELECT d.city_name, d.document_year, er.value AS recettes_fiscales, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM documents WHERE document_year = d.document_year AND siret = d.siret) AS population FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'RecettesFiscales' AND d.document_year IN ('2023', '2024') AND er.value != '' AND d.siret IN (SELECT siret FROM documents WHERE document_year = '2023' GROUP BY siret HAVING COUNT(*) > 50000) GROUP BY d.city_name, d.document_year ORDER BY d.document_year, d.city_name;

question_fr: Quelle est la répartition des dépenses d'investissement par catégorie pour les communes de plus de 100 000 habitants en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT d.city_name, SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'Equipement' THEN CAST(er.value AS FLOAT) ELSE 0 END) AS equipement, SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'RemboursementDette' THEN CAST(er.value AS FLOAT) ELSE 0 END) AS remboursement_dette FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND d.siret IN (SELECT siret FROM documents WHERE document_year = '2024' GROUP BY siret HAVING COUNT(*) > 100000) AND er.safir_field_id IN ('Equipement', 'RemboursementDette') AND er.value != '' GROUP BY d.city_name ORDER BY equipement + remboursement_dette DESC;

question_fr: Quelles sont les 5 communes avec le taux de marge budgétaire le plus élevé en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT d.city_name, (SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'RecettesReelles' THEN CAST(er.value AS FLOAT) ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'DepensesReelles' THEN CAST(er.value AS FLOAT) ELSE 0 END)) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'DepensesReelles' THEN CAST(er.value AS FLOAT) ELSE 0 END), 0) AS taux_marge FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND er.safir_field_id IN ('RecettesReelles', 'DepensesReelles') AND er.value != '' GROUP BY d.city_name ORDER BY taux_marge DESC LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Quelle est la répartition des documents extraits par commune pour l'année 2024 ?

question_fr: Quelle est l'évolution du nombre de documents extraits par mois au cours de l'année 2024 ?
sql: SELECT strftime('%m', created_at) as month, COUNT(*) as document_count FROM documents WHERE document_year = '2024' GROUP BY month ORDER BY month;

question_fr: Quelle est l'évolution des recettes de fonctionnement pour les communes de plus de 10 000 habitants entre 2022 et 2024 ?
sql: SELECT document_year, SUM(CAST(value AS FLOAT)) AS total_recettes_fonctionnement FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id WHERE safir_field_id = 'Recettes_de_fonctionnement' AND d.document_year IN ('2022', '2023', '2024') AND d.siret IN (SELECT siret FROM documents WHERE LENGTH(siret) <= 14 AND CAST(SUBSTR(siret, 1, 5) AS INTEGER) > 10000) GROUP BY document_year ORDER BY document_year;

question_fr: Quelle est l'évolution des recettes totales pour les budgets principaux (BP) par année entre 2023 et 2024 pour les communes de plus de 50 000 habitants ?
sql: SELECT d.document_year, SUM(CASE WHEN d.budget_type = 'BP' THEN CAST(e.value AS DECIMAL) ELSE 0 END) AS total_recettes_BP FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results e ON d.document_id = e.document_id WHERE d.document_year IN ('2023', '2024') AND d.siret IN (SELECT siret FROM documents WHERE LENGTH(city_name) > 50000) AND e.safir_field_id = 'Recettes_Totales' GROUP BY d.document_year ORDER BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Quelle est la répartition des dépenses de fonctionnement par fonction (éducation, santé, etc.) pour les communes rurales en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT e.safir_field_id AS fonction, SUM(CAST(e.value AS DECIMAL)) AS total_depenses FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results e ON d.document_id = e.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND e.safir_field_id LIKE 'Fonction_%' AND d.city_name LIKE '%rurale%' GROUP BY e.safir_field_id ORDER BY total_depenses DESC;

question_fr: Quelle est l'évolution des recettes fiscales totales pour les budgets principaux (BP) entre 2023 et 2024 ?
sql:
WITH fiscal_revenues_2023 AS (
    SELECT SUM(CAST(value AS FLOAT)) AS total_2023
    FROM extraction_results
    WHERE safir_field_id = 'RI01'
    AND document_id IN (
        SELECT document_id
        FROM documents
        WHERE document_year = '2023'
        AND budget_type = 'BP'
    )
),
fiscal_revenues_2024 AS (
    SELECT SUM(CAST(value AS FLOAT)) AS total_2024
    FROM extraction_results
    WHERE safir_field_id = 'RI01'
    AND document_id IN (
        SELECT document_id
        FROM documents
        WHERE document_year = '2024'
        AND budget_type = 'BP'
    )
)
SELECT
    fr2023.total_2023,
    fr2024.total_2024,
    ((fr2024.total_2024 - fr2023.total_2023) / fr2023.total_2023) * 100 AS growth_percentage
FROM fiscal_revenues_2023 fr2023, fiscal_revenues_2024 fr2024;

question_fr: Quelle est la répartition des documents extraits par type de budget (BP et BA) pour les communes de plus de 100 000 habitants en 2024 ?
sql:
WITH large_communes AS (
    SELECT
        d.city_name
    FROM documents d
    WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
    GROUP BY d.city_name
    HAVING COUNT(*) > 100
)
SELECT
    budget_type,
    COUNT(*) AS nombre_documents
FROM documents
WHERE document_year = '2024'
AND city_name IN (SELECT city_name FROM large_communes)
GROUP BY budget_type;

question_fr: Quelles sont les 10 communes avec le total des dépenses d'investissement le plus élevé en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT d.city_name, SUM(CAST(e.value AS FLOAT)) AS total_investissement FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results e ON d.document_id = e.document_id WHERE e.safir_field_id IN ('DF65', 'DF66', 'DF67') AND d.document_year = '2024' AND d.state_id IN (SELECT state_id FROM states WHERE code = 'SUCCESS') GROUP BY d.city_name ORDER BY total_investissement DESC LIMIT 10;

question_fr: Quelle est l'évolution des recettes totales de fonctionnement pour les budgets principaux (BP) entre 2023 et 2024 pour les communes de plus de 50 000 habitants ?
sql:
WITH recettes_2023 AS (
    SELECT
        d.city_name,
        SUM(CAST(er.value AS DECIMAL)) AS total_recettes
    FROM
        documents d
    JOIN
        extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id
    WHERE
        d.document_year = '2023'
        AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
        AND er.safir_field_id LIKE 'RI%'
    GROUP BY
        d.city_name
    HAVING
        SUM(CAST(er.value AS DECIMAL)) > 0
), recettes_2024 AS (
    SELECT
        d.city_name,
        SUM(CAST(er.value AS DECIMAL)) AS total_recettes
    FROM
        documents d
    JOIN
        extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id
    WHERE
        d.document_year = '2024'
        AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
        AND er.safir_field_id LIKE 'RI%'
    GROUP BY
        d.city_name
    HAVING
        SUM(CAST(er.value AS DECIMAL)) > 0
)
SELECT
    r2023.city_name,
    r2023.total_recettes AS recettes_2023,
    r2024.total_recettes AS recettes_2024,
    (r2024.total_recettes - r2023.total_recettes) AS evolution
FROM
    recettes_2023 r2023
JOIN
    recettes_2024 r2024 ON r2023.city_name = r2024.city_name
ORDER BY
    evolution DESC;

question_fr: Quelle est l'évolution du nombre de documents par type de budget (BP et BA) entre 2023 et 2024 ?
sql: SELECT document_year, budget_type, COUNT(*) as document_count FROM documents WHERE document_year IN ('2023', '2024') GROUP BY document_year, budget_type ORDER BY document_year, budget_type;

question_fr: Quelle est la répartition des documents par type de document (M57_CA, M57_CFU, etc.) pour l'année 2024 ?
sql: SELECT mask, COUNT(*) as document_count FROM documents WHERE document_year = '2024' GROUP BY mask;

question_fr: Quelles sont les 5 communes avec le plus grand nombre de documents extraits en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT city_name, COUNT(*) as document_count FROM documents WHERE document_year = '2024' GROUP BY city_name ORDER BY document_count DESC LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Quelle est la répartition des documents par type de budget et par année pour les communes de plus de 100 000 habitants en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT documents.budget_type, documents.document_year, COUNT(*) as document_count FROM documents WHERE documents.document_year = '2024' AND documents.city_name IN (SELECT city_name FROM documents GROUP BY city_name HAVING COUNT(*) > 100) GROUP BY documents.budget_type, documents.document_year ORDER BY document_count DESC;

question_fr: Quelles sont les 5 communes avec le plus fort taux de marge budgétaire en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT documents.city_name, AVG(CAST(extraction_results.value AS FLOAT)) as total_revenue, AVG(CAST((SELECT value FROM extraction_results WHERE safir_field_id = 'DépensesTotales' AND document_id = documents.document_id) AS FLOAT)) as total_expenses, (AVG(CAST(extraction_results.value AS FLOAT)) - AVG(CAST((SELECT value FROM extraction_results WHERE safir_field_id = 'DépensesTotales' AND document_id = documents.document_id) AS FLOAT))) / AVG(CAST(extraction_results.value AS FLOAT)) as budget_margin FROM extraction_results JOIN documents ON extraction_results.document_id = documents.document_id WHERE documents.document_year = '2024' AND extraction_results.safir_field_id = 'RecettesTotales' GROUP BY documents.city_name ORDER BY budget_margin DESC LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Quelle est l'évolution des recettes fiscales moyennes par habitant pour les communes de plus de 50 000 habitants entre 2023 et 2024 ?
sql:
WITH communes_population AS (
    SELECT
        d.siret,
        d.city_name,
        er.value AS population
    FROM
        documents d
    JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id
    WHERE
        er.safir_field_id = 'POPULATION'
        AND d.document_year = '2023'
        AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
), recettes_fiscales AS (
    SELECT
        d.siret,
        d.city_name,
        d.document_year,
        er.value AS recettes_fiscales
    FROM
        documents d
    JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id
    WHERE
        er.safir_field_id = 'RECETTES_FISCALES'
        AND d.document_year IN ('2023', '2024')
        AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
)
SELECT
    rf1.document_year AS year_2023,
    rf2.document_year AS year_2024,
    rf1.city_name,
    (rf1.recettes_fiscales / cp.population) AS recettes_fiscales_par_habitant_2023,
    (rf2.recettes_fiscales / cp.population) AS recettes_fiscales_par_habitant_2024,
    ((rf2.recettes_fiscales / cp.population) - (rf1.recettes_fiscales / cp.population)) / (rf1.recettes_fiscales / cp.population) * 100 AS evolution_pourcentage
FROM
    recettes_fiscales rf1
JOIN recettes_fiscales rf2 ON rf1.siret = rf2.siret AND rf2.document_year = '2024'
JOIN communes_population cp ON rf1.siret = cp.siret
WHERE
    rf1.document_year = '2023'
    AND (rf1.recettes_fiscales / cp.population) > 0
ORDER BY
    evolution_pourcentage DESC;

question_fr: Quelle est l'évolution des dépenses de personnel pour les communes de moins de 10 000 habitants entre 2023 et 2024 ?
sql:
WITH communes_petites AS (
    SELECT
        d.siret,
        d.city_name,
        er.value AS population
    FROM
        documents d
    JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id
    WHERE
        er.safir_field_id = 'POPULATION'
        AND d.document_year = '2023'
        AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
        AND CAST(er.value AS INTEGER) < 10000
), depenses_personnel AS (
    SELECT
        d.siret,
        d.city_name,
        d.document_year,
        er.value AS depenses_personnel
    FROM
        documents d
    JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id
    WHERE
        er.safir_field_id = 'DEPENSES_PERSONNEL'
        AND d.document_year IN ('2023', '2024')
        AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
)
SELECT
    dp1.document_year AS year_2023,
    dp2.document_year AS year_2024,
    dp1.city_name,
    dp1.depenses_personnel AS depenses_2023,
    dp2.depenses_personnel AS depenses_2024,
    (dp2.depenses_personnel - dp1.depenses_personnel) AS evolution_absolue,
    ((dp2.depenses_personnel - dp1.depenses_personnel) / dp1.depenses_personnel) * 100 AS evolution_pourcentage
FROM
    depenses_personnel dp1
JOIN depenses_personnel dp2 ON dp1.siret = dp2.siret AND dp2.document_year = '2024'
JOIN communes_petites cp ON dp1.siret = cp.siret
WHERE
    dp1.document_year = '2023'
ORDER BY
    evolution_pourcentage DESC;

question_fr: Quelle est l'évolution des recettes totales pour les budgets principaux entre 2023 et 2024 pour les communes de plus de 50 000 habitants ?
sql:
WITH communes_grosses AS (
    SELECT
        d.siret,
        d.city_name,
        er.value AS population
    FROM
        documents d
    JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id
    WHERE
        er.safir_field_id = 'POPULATION'
        AND d.document_year = '2023'
        AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
        AND CAST(er.value AS INTEGER) > 50000
), recettes_totales AS (
    SELECT
        d.siret,
        d.city_name,
        d.document_year,
        er.value AS recettes_totales
    FROM
        documents d
    JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id
    WHERE
        er.safir_field_id = 'RECETTES_TOTALES'
        AND d.document_year IN ('2023', '2024')
        AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
)
SELECT
    rt1.document_year AS year_2023,
    rt2.document_year AS year_2024,
    rt1.city_name,
    rt1.recettes_totales AS recettes_2023,
    rt2.recettes_totales AS recettes_2024,
    (CAST(rt2.recettes_totales AS FLOAT) - CAST(rt1.recettes_totales AS FLOAT)) AS evolution_absolue,
    ((CAST(rt2.recettes_totales AS FLOAT) - CAST(rt1.recettes_totales AS FLOAT)) / CAST(rt1.recettes_totales AS FLOAT)) * 100 AS evolution_pourcentage
FROM
    recettes_totales rt1
JOIN recettes_totales rt2 ON rt1.siret = rt2.siret AND rt2.document_year = '2024'
JOIN communes_grosses cg ON rt1.siret = cg.siret
WHERE
    rt1.document_year = '2023'
ORDER BY
    evolution_pourcentage DESC;

question_fr: Quelle est l'évolution des recettes fiscales totales pour les budgets principaux (BP) en 2024 par rapport à 2023, pour les communes de plus de 100 000 habitants ?
sql: SELECT d1.document_year, SUM(CASE WHEN d1.document_year = '2023' AND er1.value != '' THEN CAST(er1.value AS FLOAT) ELSE 0 END) AS recettes_fiscales_2023, SUM(CASE WHEN d2.document_year = '2024' AND er2.value != '' THEN CAST(er2.value AS FLOAT) ELSE 0 END) AS recettes_fiscales_2024, (SUM(CASE WHEN d2.document_year = '2024' AND er2.value != '' THEN CAST(er2.value AS FLOAT) ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN d1.document_year = '2023' AND er1.value != '' THEN CAST(er1.value AS FLOAT) ELSE 0 END)) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN d1.document_year = '2023' AND er1.value != '' THEN CAST(er1.value AS FLOAT) ELSE 0 END), 0) * 100 AS evolution_pourcentage FROM documents d1 JOIN extraction_results er1 ON d1.document_id = er1.document_id JOIN documents d2 ON d1.siret = d2.siret JOIN extraction_results er2 ON d2.document_id = er2.document_id WHERE d1.document_year = '2023' AND d2.document_year = '2024' AND d1.budget_type = 'BP' AND d2.budget_type = 'BP' AND er1.safir_field_id = 'Recettes_fiscales' AND er2.safir_field_id = 'Recettes_fiscales' AND d1.nb_pages > 100 GROUP BY d1.document_year, d2.document_year;

question_fr: Quelles sont les 5 communes avec la plus forte augmentation des dépenses d'équipement par habitant entre 2023 et 2024 ?
sql: WITH expenditures_2023 AS (SELECT documents.city_name, documents.siret, documents.document_year, SUM(CASE WHEN extraction_results.safir_field_id = 'D001' THEN CAST(extraction_results.value AS FLOAT) ELSE 0 END) AS equipment_expenditures, SUM(CASE WHEN extraction_results.safir_field_id = 'Pop' THEN CAST(extraction_results.value AS INTEGER) ELSE 0 END) AS population FROM documents JOIN extraction_results ON documents.document_id = extraction_results.document_id WHERE documents.document_year = '2023' GROUP BY documents.city_name, documents.siret, documents.document_year), expenditures_2024 AS (SELECT documents.city_name, documents.siret, documents.document_year, SUM(CASE WHEN extraction_results.safir_field_id = 'D001' THEN CAST(extraction_results.value AS FLOAT) ELSE 0 END) AS equipment_expenditures, SUM(CASE WHEN extraction_results.safir_field_id = 'Pop' THEN CAST(extraction_results.value AS INTEGER) ELSE 0 END) AS population FROM documents JOIN extraction_results ON documents.document_id = extraction_results.document_id WHERE documents.document_year = '2024' GROUP BY documents.city_name, documents.siret, documents.document_year) SELECT e2024.city_name, e2024.equipment_expenditures / e2024.population - e2023.equipment_expenditures / e2023.population AS increase_per_capita FROM expenditures_2024 e2024 JOIN expenditures_2023 e2023 ON e2024.city_name = e2023.city_name AND e2024.siret = e2023.siret ORDER BY increase_per_capita DESC LIMIT 5

question_fr: Quelle est la répartition des recettes fiscales par type de commune (urbaine, rurale) pour l'année 2024 ?
sql: SELECT documents.city_name, SUM(CASE WHEN extraction_results.safir_field_id = 'RF011' THEN CAST(extraction_results.value AS FLOAT) ELSE 0 END) AS fiscal_revenues, CASE WHEN LENGTH(documents.city_name) > 15 THEN 'Urbaine' ELSE 'Rurale' END AS commune_type FROM documents JOIN extraction_results ON documents.document_id = extraction_results.document_id WHERE documents.document_year = '2024' GROUP BY documents.city_name, CASE WHEN LENGTH(documents.city_name) > 15 THEN 'Urbaine' ELSE 'Rurale' END

question_fr: Quelle est la répartition des documents extraits par type de budget (BP et BA) pour l'année 2024 ?

question_fr: Quelle est la répartition des documents par type de budget (BP, BA) pour les communes de plus de 100 000 habitants en 2024 ?

question_fr: Quelle est l'évolution annuelle des dépenses de fonctionnement pour les communes de plus de 50 000 habitants entre 2023 et 2024 ?
sql: SELECT d.document_year, SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'D002' THEN CAST(er.value AS FLOAT) ELSE 0 END) AS total_depenses_fonctionnement FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id JOIN extraction_runs r ON er.run_id = r.run_id WHERE d.document_year IN ('2023', '2024') AND d.city_name IN (SELECT city_name FROM documents WHERE LENGTH(city_name) > 50) GROUP BY d.document_year ORDER BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Quelle est la répartition des recettes de fonctionnement par source (fiscales, non fiscales) pour les communes de moins de 10 000 habitants en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'R101' THEN CAST(er.value AS FLOAT) ELSE 0 END) AS recettes_fiscales, SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'R201' THEN CAST(er.value AS FLOAT) ELSE 0 END) AS recettes_non_fiscales FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND d.city_name IN (SELECT city_name FROM documents WHERE LENGTH(city_name) < 10);

question_fr: Quelle est la part des dépenses d'investissement dans le total des dépenses pour les budgets principaux (BP) en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'D003' THEN CAST(er.value AS FLOAT) ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id IN ('D002', 'D003') THEN CAST(er.value AS FLOAT) ELSE 0 END) AS part_depenses_investissement FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND d.budget_type = 'BP';

question_fr: Quel est le taux de documents en erreur par année ?

question_fr: Quelle est la répartition des recettes d'investissement par commune en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT d.city_name, SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'RI' THEN CAST(er.value AS FLOAT) ELSE 0 END) AS total_ri FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' GROUP BY d.city_name ORDER BY total_ri DESC;

question_fr: Quelle est l'évolution des dépenses de fonctionnement pour les communes de plus de 50 000 habitants entre 2023 et 2024 ?

question_fr: Quelle est l'évolution des dépenses d'équipement par fonction entre 2023 et 2024 ?

question_fr: Quelle est la répartition des recettes de fonctionnement par source (fiscales, non fiscales) pour les communes rurales en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'RF01' THEN CAST(er.value AS FLOAT) ELSE 0 END) AS recettes_fiscales, SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'RF02' THEN CAST(er.value AS FLOAT) ELSE 0 END) AS recettes_non_fiscales FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND d.city_name LIKE '%rural%';

question_fr: Quelle est la part des dépenses d'investissement dans le total des dépenses pour les budgets principaux en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'DI' THEN CAST(er.value AS FLOAT) ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'D' THEN CAST(er.value AS FLOAT) ELSE 0 END) AS part_di FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND d.budget_type = 'BP';

question_fr: Quelle est l'évolution des recettes fiscales totales pour les budgets annexes (BA) entre 2023 et 2024 pour les communes de plus de 50 000 habitants ?
sql: SELECT d.document_year, SUM(CASE WHEN d.budget_type = 'BA' THEN CAST(er.value AS DECIMAL) ELSE 0 END) AS total_revenues_fiscales_BA FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'Recettes_Fiscales' AND d.document_year IN ('2023', '2024') AND d.city_name IN (SELECT city_name FROM documents WHERE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM documents d2 WHERE d2.city_name = d.city_name AND d2.document_year = '2023') > 50000) GROUP BY d.document_year ORDER BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Quelle est la répartition des dépenses de fonctionnement par fonction (éducation, santé, etc.) pour les communes de plus de 100 000 habitants en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT er.safir_field_id AS fonction, SUM(CAST(er.value AS DECIMAL)) AS total_depenses FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id IN ('Education', 'Sante', 'Culture', 'Sports') AND d.document_year = '2024' AND d.city_name IN (SELECT city_name FROM documents WHERE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM documents d2 WHERE d2.city_name = d.city_name AND d2.document_year = '2024') > 100000) GROUP BY er.safir_field_id;

question_fr: Quelle est l'évolution des dépenses d'investissement par fonction entre 2023 et 2024 pour les communes de plus de 50 000 habitants ?
sql: SELECT d.document_year, er.safir_field_id AS fonction, SUM(CAST(er.value AS DECIMAL)) AS total_depenses_investissement FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id IN ('Investissement_Education', 'Investissement_Sante', 'Investissement_Culture', 'Investissement_Sports') AND d.document_year IN ('2023', '2024') AND d.city_name IN (SELECT city_name FROM documents WHERE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM documents d2 WHERE d2.city_name = d.city_name AND d2.document_year = '2023') > 50000) GROUP BY d.document_year, er.safir_field_id ORDER BY d.document_year, er.safir_field_id;

question_fr: Quelle est la part des recettes fiscales dans les recettes totales de fonctionnement pour les budgets annexes en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'Recettes_Fiscales' THEN CAST(er.value AS DECIMAL) ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'Recettes_Totales' THEN CAST(er.value AS DECIMAL) ELSE 0 END) AS part_recettes_fiscales FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE d.budget_type = 'BA' AND d.document_year = '2024';

question_fr: Quelle est la répartition des recettes fiscales par habitant pour les communes de plus de 50 000 habitants en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT documents.city_name, documents.siret, SUM(CAST(extraction_results.value AS FLOAT)) / 1000 AS recettes_fiscales_par_habitant FROM documents JOIN extraction_results ON documents.document_id = extraction_results.document_id JOIN extraction_runs ON extraction_results.run_id = extraction_runs.run_id WHERE documents.document_year = '2024' AND documents.siret IN (SELECT siret FROM documents WHERE LENGTH(siret) = 14 AND SUBSTR(siret, 1, 5) IN (SELECT SUBSTR(siret, 1, 5) FROM documents GROUP BY SUBSTR(siret, 1, 5) HAVING COUNT(*) > 50000)) AND extraction_results.safir_field_id = 'Recettes_fiscales_par_habitant' GROUP BY documents.city_name, documents.siret ORDER BY recettes_fiscales_par_habitant DESC;

question_fr: Quelles sont les 10 communes avec le total des dépenses de fonctionnement le plus élevé en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT d.city_name, SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'D001' THEN CAST(er.value AS DECIMAL) ELSE 0 END) AS total_depenses_fonctionnement FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' GROUP BY d.city_name ORDER BY total_depenses_fonctionnement DESC LIMIT 10;

question_fr: Quelle est l'évolution des recettes fiscales pour les communes de plus de 20 000 habitants entre 2023 et 2024 ?
sql: SELECT d.city_name, d.document_year, SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'RF01' THEN CAST(er.value AS DECIMAL) ELSE 0 END) AS recettes_fiscales FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE d.document_year IN ('2023', '2024') AND er.safir_field_id = 'RF01' GROUP BY d.city_name, d.document_year ORDER BY d.document_year, recettes_fiscales DESC;

question_fr: Quelle est la répartition des dépenses d'investissement par type de budget (BP et BA) pour les communes de plus de 100 000 habitants en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT d.budget_type, SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'D002' THEN CAST(er.value AS DECIMAL) ELSE 0 END) AS total_depenses_investissement FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND d.budget_type IN ('BP', 'BA') GROUP BY d.budget_type;

question_fr: Quelles sont les 5 communes avec la plus forte croissance des recettes non fiscales entre 2023 et 2024 ?
sql: WITH recettes_non_fiscales AS ( SELECT d.city_name, d.document_year, SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'RF02' THEN CAST(er.value AS DECIMAL) ELSE 0 END) AS total_recettes_non_fiscales FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE d.document_year IN ('2023', '2024') GROUP BY d.city_name, d.document_year ) SELECT r2024.city_name, (r2024.total_recettes_non_fiscales - r2023.total_recettes_non_fiscales) / r2023.total_recettes_non_fiscales * 100 AS croissance_recettes FROM recettes_non_fiscales r2024 JOIN recettes_non_fiscales r2023 ON r2024.city_name = r2023.city_name WHERE r2024.document_year = '2024' AND r2023.document_year = '2023' ORDER BY croissance_recettes DESC LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Quelle est la part des recettes de fonctionnement dans les recettes totales pour les budgets principaux en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'RF01' THEN CAST(er.value AS DECIMAL) ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'RT01' THEN CAST(er.value AS DECIMAL) ELSE 0 END) AS part_recettes_fonctionnement FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND d.budget_type = 'BP';

question_fr: Quelle est la répartition des recettes par source (fiscales, non fiscales) pour les communes rurales en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT 'Fiscales' AS source, SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'RF01' THEN CAST(er.value AS DECIMAL) ELSE 0 END) AS total_recettes FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' UNION ALL SELECT 'Non fiscales', SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'RF02' THEN CAST(er.value AS DECIMAL) ELSE 0 END) FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024';

sql: SELECT d.document_year, SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'RT01' THEN CAST(er.value AS DECIMAL) ELSE 0 END) AS total_recettes FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE d.document_year IN ('2023', '2024') AND d.budget_type = 'BP' GROUP BY d.document_year ORDER BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Quelle est la répartition des recettes totales par type de budget (BP et BA) pour les communes de plus de 100 000 habitants en 2024 ?

question_fr: Quelles sont les 5 communes avec le nombre de documents extraits le plus élevé en 2024, triées par nombre de documents ?
sql: SELECT d.city_name, COUNT(*) AS nb_documents FROM documents d WHERE d.document_year = '2024' GROUP BY d.city_name ORDER BY nb_documents DESC LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Quelles sont les communes avec le plus fort taux de marge budgétaire en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT d.city_name, (SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'RI16' THEN CAST(er.value AS FLOAT) ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'DF011' THEN CAST(er.value AS FLOAT) ELSE 0 END)) * 100.0 / SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'RI16' THEN CAST(er.value AS FLOAT) ELSE 0 END) AS taux_marge FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' GROUP BY d.city_name ORDER BY taux_marge DESC;

question_fr: Quelle est l'évolution du total des recettes fiscales pour les communes rurales entre 2023 et 2024 ?
sql: SELECT d.document_year, SUM(CASE WHEN er.value != '' THEN CAST(er.value AS DECIMAL) ELSE 0 END) AS total_recettes_fiscales FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE d.city_name LIKE '%COMMUNE%' AND d.document_year IN ('2023', '2024') AND er.safir_field_id = 'Recettes_Fiscales' GROUP BY d.document_year ORDER BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Quelle est l'évolution du total des recettes fiscales pour les budgets principaux (BP) par commune entre 2023 et 2024 ?
sql: SELECT d.city_name, SUM(CASE WHEN d.document_year = '2023' THEN CAST(er.value AS FLOAT) ELSE 0 END) AS recettes_2023, SUM(CASE WHEN d.document_year = '2024' THEN CAST(er.value AS FLOAT) ELSE 0 END) AS recettes_2024 FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE d.budget_type = 'BP' AND er.safir_field_id = 'RF01' AND d.document_year IN ('2023', '2024') GROUP BY d.city_name ORDER BY recettes_2024 - recettes_2023 DESC;

question_fr: Quelle est la répartition des documents extraits par type de document (M57_CA, M57_CFU, etc.) pour les communes de plus de 50 000 habitants en 2024 ?

question_fr: Quelles sont les 10 communes avec le plus grand déficit budgétaire en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT d.city_name, SUM(CAST(er.value AS FLOAT)) AS total_deficit FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'Deficit' AND d.document_year = '2024' GROUP BY d.city_name ORDER BY total_deficit DESC LIMIT 10;

question_fr: Quelle est l'évolution des recettes fiscales pour les communes de moins de 20 000 habitants entre 2023 et 2024 ?
sql: WITH fiscal_revenues_2023 AS (SELECT d.city_name, SUM(CAST(er.value AS FLOAT)) AS total_revenues FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'Impots' AND d.document_year = '2023' GROUP BY d.city_name HAVING COUNT(*) > 0), fiscal_revenues_2024 AS (SELECT d.city_name, SUM(CAST(er.value AS FLOAT)) AS total_revenues FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'Impots' AND d.document_year = '2024' GROUP BY d.city_name HAVING COUNT(*) > 0) SELECT fr2023.city_name, fr2023.total_revenues AS revenues_2023, fr2024.total_revenues AS revenues_2024, (fr2024.total_revenues - fr2023.total_revenues) AS difference, ((fr2024.total_revenues - fr2023.total_revenues) / fr2023.total_revenues) * 100 AS percentage_change FROM fiscal_revenues_2023 fr2023 JOIN fiscal_revenues_2024 fr2024 ON fr2023.city_name = fr2024.city_name ORDER BY percentage_change DESC;

question_fr: Quelles sont les 5 communes avec la plus forte augmentation des dépenses de personnel par habitant entre 2023 et 2024 ?
sql: WITH personnel_expenses_2023 AS (SELECT d.city_name, SUM(CAST(er.value AS FLOAT)) AS total_expenses FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'Personnel' AND d.document_year = '2023' GROUP BY d.city_name HAVING COUNT(*) > 0), personnel_expenses_2024 AS (SELECT d.city_name, SUM(CAST(er.value AS FLOAT)) AS total_expenses FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'Personnel' AND d.document_year = '2024' GROUP BY d.city_name HAVING COUNT(*) > 0), population AS (SELECT d.city_name, SUM(CAST(er.value AS FLOAT)) AS total_population FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'Population' AND d.document_year = '2023' GROUP BY d.city_name HAVING COUNT(*) > 0) SELECT pe2024.city_name, pe2024.total_expenses / p.total_population AS expenses_per_capita_2024, pe2023.total_expenses / p.total_population AS expenses_per_capita_2023, ((pe2024.total_expenses / p.total_population) - (pe2023.total_expenses / p.total_population)) AS difference, ((pe2024.total_expenses / p.total_population - pe2023.total_expenses / p.total_population) / (pe2023.total_expenses / p.total_population)) * 100 AS percentage_change FROM personnel_expenses_2024 pe2024 JOIN personnel_expenses_2023 pe2023 ON pe2024.city_name = pe2023.city_name JOIN population p ON pe2024.city_name = p.city_name ORDER BY percentage_change DESC LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Quelle est l'évolution des recettes totales pour les budgets annexes (BA) entre 2023 et 2024 pour les communes de plus de 50 000 habitants ?
sql: WITH total_revenues_2023 AS (SELECT d.city_name, SUM(CAST(er.value AS FLOAT)) AS total_revenues FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE d.budget_type = 'BA' AND d.document_year = '2023' GROUP BY d.city_name HAVING COUNT(*) > 0), total_revenues_2024 AS (SELECT d.city_name, SUM(CAST(er.value AS FLOAT)) AS total_revenues FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE d.budget_type = 'BA' AND d.document_year = '2024' GROUP BY d.city_name HAVING COUNT(*) > 0) SELECT tr2023.city_name, tr2023.total_revenues AS revenues_2023, tr2024.total_revenues AS revenues_2024, (tr2024.total_revenues - tr2023.total_revenues) AS difference, ((tr2024.total_revenues - tr2023.total_revenues) / tr2023.total_revenues) * 100 AS percentage_change FROM total_revenues_2023 tr2023 JOIN total_revenues_2024 tr2024 ON tr2023.city_name = tr2024.city_name ORDER BY percentage_change DESC;

question_fr: Quelle est l'évolution des recettes fiscales totales pour les budgets principaux (BP) entre 2023 et 2024 pour les communes de plus de 50 000 habitants ?
sql: SELECT d1.document_year, d1.city_name, r1.value as recettes_2023, r2.value as recettes_2024, (CAST(r2.value AS REAL) - CAST(r1.value AS REAL)) as evolution FROM documents d1 JOIN extraction_results r1 ON d1.document_id = r1.document_id JOIN documents d2 ON d1.city_name = d2.city_name JOIN extraction_results r2 ON d2.document_id = r2.document_id WHERE d1.document_year = '2023' AND d2.document_year = '2024' AND d1.siret IN (SELECT siret FROM documents WHERE nb_pages > 50000) AND d1.budget_type = 'BP' AND d2.budget_type = 'BP' AND r1.safir_field_id = 'recettes_fiscales' AND r2.safir_field_id = 'recettes_fiscales' GROUP BY d1.document_year, d1.city_name, r1.value, r2.value;

question_fr: Quelle est la répartition des recettes totales par type de budget (BP et BA) pour les communes de plus de 100 000 habitants en 2024, triée par nombre de documents ?
sql: SELECT d.budget_type, SUM(CAST(r.value AS REAL)) as total_recettes FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND d.siret IN (SELECT siret FROM documents WHERE nb_pages > 100000) AND r.safir_field_id = 'recettes_totales' GROUP BY d.budget_type ORDER BY total_recettes DESC;

question_fr: Quelles sont les 10 communes avec les dépenses d'investissement les plus élevées en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT city_name, SUM(CAST(value AS FLOAT)) AS total_investment FROM documents JOIN extraction_results ON documents.document_id = extraction_results.document_id WHERE safir_field_id IN ('D101', 'D102', 'D103', 'D104') AND document_year = '2024' AND documents.budget_type = 'BP' GROUP BY city_name ORDER BY total_investment DESC LIMIT 10;

question_fr: Quelles sont les 5 communes avec la plus forte augmentation des recettes non fiscales entre 2023 et 2024 ?
sql: SELECT d1.city_name, (d2.value - d1.value) AS augmentation_recettes_non_fiscales FROM (SELECT city_name, value FROM documents JOIN extraction_results ON documents.document_id = extraction_results.document_id WHERE safir_field_id = 'RI20' AND document_year = '2023') d1 JOIN (SELECT city_name, value FROM documents JOIN extraction_results ON documents.document_id = extraction_results.document_id WHERE safir_field_id = 'RI20' AND document_year = '2024') d2 ON d1.city_name = d2.city_name ORDER BY augmentation_recettes_non_fiscales DESC LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Quelle est la répartition des documents extraits par type de budget (BP et BA) pour l'année 2023 ?
sql: SELECT documents.budget_type, COUNT(*) as document_count FROM documents WHERE documents.document_year = '2023' GROUP BY documents.budget_type;

question_fr: Quelle est la répartition des documents par format (PDF, scan, image) pour l'année 2024 ?
sql: SELECT format, COUNT(*) as document_count FROM documents WHERE document_year = '2024' GROUP BY format ORDER BY document_count DESC;

question_fr: Quelle est l'évolution des dépenses de personnel pour les budgets principaux (BP) entre 2023 et 2024 ?
sql: SELECT document_year, SUM(CAST(value AS FLOAT)) as total_personnel_expenses FROM extraction_results JOIN documents ON extraction_results.document_id = documents.document_id WHERE safir_field_id = 'D001' AND budget_type = 'BP' AND document_year IN ('2023', '2024') GROUP BY document_year;

question_fr: Quelle est la répartition des recettes fiscales par type de commune (urbaine, rurale) pour l'année 2023 ?
sql: SELECT d.budget_type, SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'RF01' THEN CAST(er.value AS DECIMAL) ELSE 0 END) AS recettes_fiscales, SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'RF02' THEN CAST(er.value AS DECIMAL) ELSE 0 END) AS recettes_non_fiscales FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2023' AND er.safir_field_id IN ('RF01', 'RF02') GROUP BY d.budget_type;

question_fr: Quelle est la répartition des recettes totales par type de budget (BP et BA) pour les communes de plus de 50 000 habitants en 2024 ?

question_fr: Quelle est l'évolution des dépenses de fonctionnement pour les communes de plus de 100 000 habitants entre 2023 et 2024 ?
sql: SELECT d.document_year, SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'Dépenses_Fonctionnement' THEN CAST(er.value AS FLOAT) ELSE 0 END) AS total_depenses_fonctionnement FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE d.document_year IN ('2023', '2024') AND d.city_name IN (SELECT city_name FROM documents WHERE LENGTH(city_name) > 100000) GROUP BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Quelle est la répartition des documents par type de document (M57_CA, M57_CFU, etc.) pour les communes de plus de 50 000 habitants en 2024, triée par nombre de documents ?
sql: SELECT documents.mask, COUNT(*) AS nombre_documents FROM documents JOIN extraction_results ON documents.document_id = extraction_results.document_id WHERE documents.document_year = '2024' AND documents.city_name IN (SELECT city_name FROM documents WHERE LENGTH(siret) = 14 AND CAST(SUBSTR(siret, 5, 3) AS INTEGER) >= 200 AND CAST(SUBSTR(siret, 5, 3) AS INTEGER) <= 299) GROUP BY documents.mask ORDER BY nombre_documents DESC;

question_fr: Quelle est la répartition des dépenses d'investissement par fonction pour les communes de plus de 100 000 habitants en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT er.value AS fonction, SUM(CAST(er2.value AS FLOAT)) AS montant FROM extraction_results er JOIN documents d ON er.document_id = d.document_id JOIN extraction_results er2 ON er.document_id = er2.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'Fonction' AND er2.safir_field_id = 'DépensesInvestissement' AND d.document_year = '2024' AND d.city_name IN (SELECT d2.city_name FROM documents d2 JOIN extraction_results er3 ON d2.document_id = er3.document_id WHERE er3.safir_field_id = 'Population' AND CAST(er3.value AS INTEGER) > 100000) GROUP BY er.value ORDER BY montant DESC;

question_fr: Quelle est l'évolution des recettes fiscales par habitant pour les communes de moins de 20 000 habitants entre 2023 et 2024 ?
sql: SELECT d.city_name, er.value AS recettes_fiscales_2023, er2.value AS recettes_fiscales_2024, (CAST(er2.value AS FLOAT) - CAST(er.value AS FLOAT)) / CAST(er.value AS FLOAT) * 100 AS evolution FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id JOIN extraction_results er2 ON d.document_id = er2.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'RecettesFiscales' AND er2.safir_field_id = 'RecettesFiscales' AND d.document_year = '2023' AND er2.document_id IN (SELECT d2.document_id FROM documents d2 JOIN extraction_results er3 ON d2.document_id = er3.document_id WHERE er3.safir_field_id = 'Population' AND CAST(er3.value AS INTEGER) < 20000) AND er2.document_id IN (SELECT d3.document_id FROM documents d3 WHERE d3.document_year = '2024') GROUP BY d.city_name, er.value, er2.value ORDER BY evolution DESC;

question_fr: Quelle est l'évolution des recettes de fonctionnement par fonction entre 2023 et 2024 pour les communes de plus de 50 000 habitants ?
sql:
WITH recettes_2023 AS (
    SELECT
        d.city_name,
        SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id LIKE 'RI%' THEN CAST(er.value AS DECIMAL) ELSE 0 END) AS total_recettes
    FROM
        documents d
    JOIN
        extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id
    WHERE
        d.document_year = '2023'
        AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
        AND er.safir_field_id LIKE 'RI%'
    GROUP BY
        d.city_name
    HAVING
        SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id LIKE 'RI%' THEN CAST(er.value AS DECIMAL) ELSE 0 END) > 0
),
recettes_2024 AS (
    SELECT
        d.city_name,
        SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id LIKE 'RI%' THEN CAST(er.value AS DECIMAL) ELSE 0 END) AS total_recettes
    FROM
        documents d
    JOIN
        extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id
    WHERE
        d.document_year = '2024'
        AND d.budget_type = 'BP'
        AND er.safir_field_id LIKE 'RI%'
    GROUP BY
        d.city_name
    HAVING
        SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id LIKE 'RI%' THEN CAST(er.value AS DECIMAL) ELSE 0 END) > 0
)

SELECT
    r2023.city_name,
    r2023.total_recettes AS recettes_2023,
    r2024.total_recettes AS recettes_2024,
    (r2024.total_recettes - r2023.total_recettes) AS evolution
FROM
    recettes_2023 r2023
JOIN
    recettes_2024 r2024 ON r2023.city_name = r2024.city_name
ORDER BY
    evolution DESC;

question_fr: Quelle est la part des dépenses d'investissement dans le total des dépenses pour les budgets annexes (BA) en 2024 ?
sql:
WITH depenses_investissement AS (
    SELECT
        d.city_name,
        SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id LIKE 'DI%' THEN CAST(er.value AS DECIMAL) ELSE 0 END) AS total_investissement
    FROM
        documents d
    JOIN
        extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id
    WHERE
        d.document_year = '2024'
        AND d.budget_type = 'BA'
        AND er.safir_field_id LIKE 'DI%'
    GROUP BY
        d.city_name
    HAVING
        SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id LIKE 'DI%' THEN CAST(er.value AS DECIMAL) ELSE 0 END) > 0
),
depenses_totales AS (
    SELECT
        d.city_name,
        SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id LIKE 'D%' THEN CAST(er.value AS DECIMAL) ELSE 0 END) AS total_depenses
    FROM
        documents d
    JOIN
        extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id
    WHERE
        d.document_year = '2024'
        AND d.budget_type = 'BA'
        AND er.safir_field_id LIKE 'D%'
    GROUP BY
        d.city_name
    HAVING
        SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id LIKE 'D%' THEN CAST(er.value AS DECIMAL) ELSE 0 END) > 0
)

SELECT
    di.city_name,
    di.total_investissement,
    dt.total_depenses,
    (di.total_investissement / dt.total_depenses) * 100 AS part_investissement
FROM
    depenses_investissement di
JOIN
    depenses_totales dt ON di.city_name = dt.city_name
ORDER BY
    part_investissement DESC;

question_fr: Quelles sont les 5 communes avec la plus forte croissance des recettes fiscales par habitant entre 2023 et 2024 ?
sql:
WITH fiscal_revenues_2023 AS (
  SELECT
d.city_name,
  SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'Recettes fiscales' AND d.document_year = '2023' THEN CAST(er.value AS FLOAT) ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(DISTINCT d.siret) AS fiscal_revenues_per_capita_2023
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id
  WHERE d.budget_type = 'BP' AND d.document_year = '2023'
  GROUP BY d.city_name
),
fiscal_revenues_2024 AS (
  SELECT
d.city_name,
  SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'Recettes fiscales' AND d.document_year = '2024' THEN CAST(er.value AS FLOAT) ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(DISTINCT d.siret) AS fiscal_revenues_per_capita_2024
  FROM documents d
  JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id
  WHERE d.budget_type = 'BP' AND d.document_year = '2024'
  GROUP BY d.city_name
)
SELECT
  fr2023.city_name,
  fr2023.fiscal_revenues_per_capita_2023,
  fr2024.fiscal_revenues_per_capita_2024,
  ((fr2024.fiscal_revenues_per_capita_2024 - fr2023.fiscal_revenues_per_capita_2023) / fr2023.fiscal_revenues_per_capita_2023) * 100 AS growth_percentage
FROM fiscal_revenues_2023 fr2023
JOIN fiscal_revenues_2024 fr2024 ON fr2023.city_name = fr2024.city_name
ORDER BY growth_percentage DESC
LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Quelle est la répartition des recettes fiscales par type de commune (urbaine, rurale) en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT city_name, SUM(CASE WHEN city_name LIKE '%VILLE%' OR city_name LIKE '%COMMUNE%' THEN CAST(value AS FLOAT) ELSE 0 END) AS recettes_fiscales_urbaines, SUM(CASE WHEN city_name NOT LIKE '%VILLE%' AND city_name NOT LIKE '%COMMUNE%' THEN CAST(value AS FLOAT) ELSE 0 END) AS recettes_fiscales_rurales FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results r ON d.document_id = r.document_id WHERE r.safir_field_id = 'RecettesFiscales' AND d.document_year = '2024' GROUP BY city_name;

question_fr: Quelle est l'évolution des recettes fiscales par commune entre 2023 et 2024 pour les communes de plus de 50 000 habitants ?
sql:
WITH fiscal_revenues_2023 AS (
    SELECT
        d.city_name,
        SUM(CAST(er.value AS FLOAT)) AS total_revenues
    FROM
        documents d
    JOIN
        extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id
    WHERE
        er.safir_field_id = 'Fiscal Revenues'
        AND d.document_year = '2023'
        AND d.siret IN (
            SELECT d2.siret
            FROM documents d2
            JOIN extraction_results er2 ON d2.document_id = er2.document_id
            WHERE er2.safir_field_id = 'Population'
            GROUP BY d2.siret
            HAVING SUM(CAST(er2.value AS INTEGER)) > 50000
        )
    GROUP BY
        d.city_name
),

fiscal_revenues_2024 AS (
    SELECT
        d.city_name,
        SUM(CAST(er.value AS FLOAT)) AS total_revenues
    FROM
        documents d
    JOIN
        extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id
    WHERE
        er.safir_field_id = 'Fiscal Revenues'
        AND d.document_year = '2024'
        AND d.siret IN (
            SELECT d2.siret
            FROM documents d2
            JOIN extraction_results er2 ON d2.document_id = er2.document_id
            WHERE er2.safir_field_id = 'Population'
            GROUP BY d2.siret
            HAVING SUM(CAST(er2.value AS INTEGER)) > 50000
        )
    GROUP BY
        d.city_name
)

SELECT
    fr2023.city_name,
    fr2023.total_revenues AS revenues_2023,
    fr2024.total_revenues AS revenues_2024,
    (fr2024.total_revenues - fr2023.total_revenues) AS difference,
    ((fr2024.total_revenues - fr2023.total_revenues) / fr2023.total_revenues) * 100 AS percentage_change
FROM
    fiscal_revenues_2023 fr2023
JOIN
    fiscal_revenues_2024 fr2024 ON fr2023.city_name = fr2024.city_name
ORDER BY
    percentage_change DESC;

question_fr: Quelles sont les 10 communes avec le total des recettes de fonctionnement le plus élevé en 2024 ?

question_fr: Quelle est la répartition des recettes de fonctionnement par source pour les communes rurales en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT 'Fiscales' AS source, SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id LIKE 'RI%' THEN CAST(er.value AS FLOAT) ELSE 0 END) AS total FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND d.city_name IN (SELECT city_name FROM documents WHERE siret LIKE '%000%') UNION ALL SELECT 'Non fiscales' AS source, SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id NOT LIKE 'RI%' AND er.safir_field_id LIKE 'RF%' THEN CAST(er.value AS FLOAT) ELSE 0 END) AS total FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND d.city_name IN (SELECT city_name FROM documents WHERE siret LIKE '%000%');

question_fr: Quelle est la répartition des documents extraits par type de budget (BP et BA) pour l'année 2024, triée par nombre de documents ?

question_fr: Quelle est la répartition des documents extraits par type de document (M57_CA, M57_CFU, etc.) pour les communes de plus de 50 000 habitants en 2024, triée par nombre de documents ?

question_fr: Quelle est l'évolution des dépenses d'équipement pour les communes de plus de 50 000 habitants entre 2023 et 2024 ?
sql:
WITH communes_grandes AS (
  SELECT
    document_id,
    city_name
  FROM
    documents
  WHERE
    documents.city_name IN (
      SELECT city_name
      FROM documents
      WHERE LENGTH(city_name) > 20
      GROUP BY city_name
      HAVING COUNT(*) >= 1
    )
)
SELECT
  documents.document_year,
  communes_grandes.city_name,
  SUM(CASE WHEN extraction_results.safir_field_id LIKE 'DE%' THEN CAST(extraction_results.value AS FLOAT) ELSE 0 END) AS depenses_equipement
FROM
  documents
JOIN
  communes_grandes ON documents.document_id = communes_grandes.document_id
JOIN
  extraction_results ON documents.document_id = extraction_results.document_id
WHERE
  documents.document_year IN ('2023', '2024')
GROUP BY
  documents.document_year,
  communes_grandes.city_name
ORDER BY
  documents.document_year,
  depenses_equipement DESC;

question_fr: Quelles sont les 10 communes avec le total des dépenses d'équipement le plus élevé en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT d.city_name, SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'D001' THEN CAST(er.value AS FLOAT) ELSE 0 END) AS total_depenses_equipement FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND er.safir_field_id = 'D001' GROUP BY d.city_name ORDER BY total_depenses_equipement DESC LIMIT 10;

question_fr: Quelle est l'évolution des recettes fiscales par habitant pour les communes rurales entre 2023 et 2024 ?
sql: WITH rural_communes AS (SELECT document_id, city_name FROM documents WHERE siret LIKE '2%'), recettes_2023 AS (SELECT d.city_name, SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'RI10' THEN CAST(er.value AS FLOAT) ELSE 0 END) AS total_recettes_fiscales FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2023' AND er.safir_field_id = 'RI10' GROUP BY d.city_name), recettes_2024 AS (SELECT d.city_name, SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'RI10' THEN CAST(er.value AS FLOAT) ELSE 0 END) AS total_recettes_fiscales FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND er.safir_field_id = 'RI10' GROUP BY d.city_name) SELECT r2024.city_name, r2024.total_recettes_fiscales - r2023.total_recettes_fiscales AS evolution_recettes_fiscales FROM recettes_2024 r2024 JOIN recettes_2023 r2023 ON r2024.city_name = r2023.city_name JOIN rural_communes rc ON r2024.city_name = rc.city_name ORDER BY evolution_recettes_fiscales DESC;

question_fr: Quelle est la répartition des recettes de fonctionnement par fonction pour les communes de plus de 100 000 habitants en 2024 ?
sql: WITH grandes_communes AS (SELECT document_id, city_name FROM documents WHERE siret LIKE '1%'), recettes_fonctionnement AS (SELECT d.city_name, er.safir_field_id, SUM(CAST(er.value AS FLOAT)) AS total_recettes FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND er.safir_field_id IN ('RI10', 'RI20', 'RI30', 'RI40', 'RI50') GROUP BY d.city_name, er.safir_field_id) SELECT rf.safir_field_id, SUM(rf.total_recettes) AS total_recettes_fonctionnement FROM recettes_fonctionnement rf JOIN grandes_communes gc ON rf.city_name = gc.city_name GROUP BY rf.safir_field_id;

question_fr: Quelle est l'évolution des dépenses de personnel pour les budgets principaux entre 2023 et 2024 ?
sql: WITH depenses_personnel_2023 AS (SELECT SUM(CAST(er.value AS FLOAT)) AS total_depenses_personnel FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2023' AND d.budget_type = 'BP' AND er.safir_field_id = 'D101'), depenses_personnel_2024 AS (SELECT SUM(CAST(er.value AS FLOAT)) AS total_depenses_personnel FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND d.budget_type = 'BP' AND er.safir_field_id = 'D101') SELECT (dp2024.total_depenses_personnel - dp2023.total_depenses_personnel) AS evolution_depenses_personnel FROM depenses_personnel_2024 dp2024, depenses_personnel_2023 dp2023;

question_fr: Quelle est la répartition des recettes totales par type de budget pour les communes de plus de 100 000 habitants en 2024 ?
sql: WITH grandes_communes AS (SELECT document_id, city_name FROM documents WHERE siret LIKE '1%'), recettes_totales AS (SELECT d.city_name, d.budget_type, SUM(CAST(er.value AS FLOAT)) AS total_recettes FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND er.safir_field_id IN ('RI10', 'RI20', 'RI30', 'RI40', 'RI50') GROUP BY d.city_name, d.budget_type) SELECT rt.budget_type, SUM(rt.total_recettes) AS total_recettes FROM recettes_totales rt JOIN grandes_communes gc ON rt.city_name = gc.city_name GROUP BY rt.budget_type;

question_fr: Quelle est la répartition des documents extraits par type de budget pour l'année 2023 ?

question_fr: Quelle est l'évolution des recettes totales pour les budgets annexes entre 2023 et 2024 pour les communes de plus de 50 000 habitants ?
sql: WITH grandes_communes AS (SELECT document_id, city_name FROM documents WHERE siret LIKE '1%'), recettes_totales_2023 AS (SELECT SUM(CAST(er.value AS FLOAT)) AS total_recettes FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id JOIN grandes_communes gc ON d.document_id = gc.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2023' AND d.budget_type = 'BA' AND er.safir_field_id IN ('RI10', 'RI20', 'RI30', 'RI40', 'RI50')), recettes_totales_2024 AS (SELECT SUM(CAST(er.value AS FLOAT)) AS total_recettes FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id JOIN grandes_communes gc ON d.document_id = gc.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND d.budget_type = 'BA' AND er.safir_field_id IN ('RI10', 'RI20', 'RI30', 'RI40', 'RI50')) SELECT (rt2024.total_recettes - rt2023.total_recettes) AS evolution_recettes_totales FROM recettes_totales_2024 rt2024, recettes_totales_2023 rt2023;

question_fr: Quelle est la répartition des dépenses d'investissement par type de budget pour les communes de plus de 100 000 habitants en 2024 ?
sql: WITH grandes_communes AS (SELECT document_id, city_name FROM documents WHERE siret LIKE '1%'), depenses_investissement AS (SELECT d.city_name, d.budget_type, SUM(CAST(er.value AS FLOAT)) AS total_depenses FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND er.safir_field_id IN ('D001', 'D002', 'D003', 'D004', 'D005') GROUP BY d.city_name, d.budget_type) SELECT di.budget_type, SUM(di.total_depenses) AS total_depenses_investissement FROM depenses_investissement di JOIN grandes_communes gc ON di.city_name = gc.city_name GROUP BY di.budget_type;

question_fr: Quelle est la répartition des recettes fiscales par type de commune en 2024 ?
sql: WITH urbaines_communes AS (SELECT document_id, city_name FROM documents WHERE siret LIKE '1%'), rurales_communes AS (SELECT document_id, city_name FROM documents WHERE siret LIKE '2%'), recettes_fiscales_urbaines AS (SELECT SUM(CAST(er.value AS FLOAT)) AS total_recettes_fiscales FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id JOIN urbaines_communes uc ON d.document_id = uc.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND er.safir_field_id = 'RI10'), recettes_fiscales_rurales AS (SELECT SUM(CAST(er.value AS FLOAT)) AS total_recettes_fiscales FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id JOIN rurales_communes rc ON d.document_id = rc.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND er.safir_field_id = 'RI10') SELECT 'Urbaine' AS type_commune, rfu.total_recettes_fiscales AS total_recettes_fiscales FROM recettes_fiscales_urbaines rfu UNION ALL SELECT 'Rurale' AS type_commune, rfr.total_recettes_fiscales AS total_recettes_fiscales FROM recettes_fiscales_rurales rfr;

question_fr: Quelle est la répartition des documents extraits par type de budget pour l'année 2024, triée par nombre de documents ?

question_fr: Quelle est la répartition des documents extraits par type de document pour les communes de plus de 50 000 habitants en 2024, triée par nombre de documents ?
