question_fr: Quelle est la part des dépenses d'investissement dans le total des dépenses pour les budgets annexes en 2024 ?
sql: WITH depenses_investissement AS (SELECT SUM(CAST(er.value AS FLOAT)) AS total_depenses_investissement FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND d.budget_type = 'BA' AND er.safir_field_id IN ('D001', 'D002', 'D003', 'D004', 'D005')), depenses_totales AS (SELECT SUM(CAST(er.value AS FLOAT)) AS total_depenses FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND d.budget_type = 'BA' AND er.safir_field_id IN ('D001', 'D002', 'D003', 'D004', 'D005', 'D101', 'D102', 'D103', 'D104', 'D105')) SELECT (di.total_depenses_investissement * 100.0 / dt.total_depenses) AS part_depenses_investissement FROM depenses_investissement di, depenses_totales dt;

question_fr: Quelles sont les 5 communes avec le nombre de documents extraits le plus élevé en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT d.city_name, COUNT(*) AS nombre_documents FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id JOIN extraction_runs r ON er.run_id = r.run_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' GROUP BY d.city_name ORDER BY nombre_documents DESC LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Quelle est l'évolution des recettes fiscales pour les communes rurales entre 2023 et 2024 ?
sql: SELECT d.document_year, SUM(CASE WHEN d.city_name NOT LIKE '%Ville%' AND d.city_name NOT LIKE '%Communauté%' THEN CAST(er.value AS FLOAT) ELSE 0 END) AS recettes_fiscales_rurales FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id JOIN extraction_runs r ON er.run_id = r.run_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'Recettes_fiscales' AND d.document_year IN ('2023', '2024') GROUP BY d.document_year ORDER BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Quelle est la répartition des recettes fiscales par type de commune (urbaine, rurale) en 2023 ?
sql: SELECT d.city_name, SUM(CASE WHEN d.city_name LIKE '%Ville%' OR d.city_name LIKE '%Communauté%' THEN er.value ELSE 0 END) AS recettes_urbaines, SUM(CASE WHEN d.city_name NOT LIKE '%Ville%' AND d.city_name NOT LIKE '%Communauté%' THEN er.value ELSE 0 END) AS recettes_rurales FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id JOIN extraction_runs r ON er.run_id = r.run_id WHERE d.document_year = '2023' AND er.safir_field_id = 'Recettes_fiscales' GROUP BY d.city_name ORDER BY recettes_urbaines DESC, recettes_rurales DESC;

question_fr: Quelle est l'évolution des dépenses en personnel pour les budgets principaux (BP) entre 2023 et 2024 ?
sql: SELECT d.document_year, SUM(CASE WHEN d.budget_type = 'BP' AND er.safir_field_id = 'D001' THEN CAST(er.value AS DECIMAL) ELSE 0 END) AS total_depenses_personnel FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE d.document_year IN ('2023', '2024') AND d.budget_type = 'BP' GROUP BY d.document_year ORDER BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Quelle est l'évolution des recettes fiscales pour les budgets principaux (BP) par commune entre 2023 et 2024 ?
sql: SELECT d.city_name, d.document_year, SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'RI1' THEN CAST(er.value AS DECIMAL) ELSE 0 END) AS total_recettes_fiscales FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE d.document_year IN ('2023', '2024') AND d.budget_type = 'BP' GROUP BY d.city_name, d.document_year ORDER BY d.city_name, d.document_year;

question_fr: Quelle est l'évolution du total des recettes d'investissement pour les communes de moins de 20 000 habitants entre 2023 et 2024 ?
sql: SELECT document_year, SUM(CAST(value AS DECIMAL)) AS total_recettes_investissement FROM extraction_results JOIN documents ON extraction_results.document_id = documents.document_id WHERE documents.city_name IN (SELECT city_name FROM documents JOIN sections ON documents.document_id = sections.document_id WHERE sections.section_value LIKE '%population < 20000%') AND safir_field_id IN ('D001', 'D002', 'D003') AND document_year IN ('2023', '2024') GROUP BY document_year ORDER BY document_year;

question_fr: Quelle est la répartition des dépenses de personnel par fonction pour les communes de plus de 100 000 habitants en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT safir_field_id AS fonction, SUM(CAST(value AS DECIMAL)) AS total_depenses FROM extraction_results JOIN documents ON extraction_results.document_id = documents.document_id WHERE documents.city_name IN (SELECT city_name FROM documents JOIN sections ON documents.document_id = sections.document_id WHERE sections.section_value LIKE '%population > 100000%') AND document_year = '2024' AND safir_field_id LIKE 'F%' GROUP BY safir_field_id ORDER BY total_depenses DESC;

question_fr: Quelle est la part des recettes fiscales dans les recettes totales pour les budgets annexes (BA) en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN safir_field_id = 'Recette_fiscale' THEN CAST(value AS DECIMAL) ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / SUM(CASE WHEN safir_field_id IN ('Recette_fiscale', 'Recette_non_fiscale') THEN CAST(value AS DECIMAL) ELSE 0 END) AS part_recettes_fiscales FROM extraction_results JOIN documents ON extraction_results.document_id = documents.document_id WHERE document_year = '2024' AND budget_type = 'BA';

question_fr: Quelle est la part des recettes fiscales dans les recettes totales pour les budgets principaux (BP) en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT (SUM(CASE WHEN documents.budget_type = 'BP' AND extraction_results.safir_field_id = 'RF10' THEN CAST(extraction_results.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / SUM(CASE WHEN documents.budget_type = 'BP' AND (extraction_results.safir_field_id LIKE 'RF%' OR extraction_results.safir_field_id LIKE 'RI%') THEN CAST(extraction_results.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END)) AS part_recettes_fiscales_bp_2024 FROM documents JOIN extraction_results ON documents.document_id = extraction_results.document_id WHERE documents.document_year = '2024';

question_fr: Quelle est l'évolution des dépenses de fonctionnement par fonction entre 2023 et 2024 pour les communes de plus de 50 000 habitants ?
sql: SELECT documents.city_name, extraction_results.safir_field_id AS fonction, SUM(CASE WHEN documents.document_year = '2023' THEN CAST(extraction_results.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS total_2023, SUM(CASE WHEN documents.document_year = '2024' THEN CAST(extraction_results.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS total_2024, (SUM(CASE WHEN documents.document_year = '2024' THEN CAST(extraction_results.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN documents.document_year = '2023' THEN CAST(extraction_results.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END)) AS evolution FROM documents JOIN extraction_results ON documents.document_id = extraction_results.document_id WHERE extraction_results.safir_field_id LIKE 'D%' AND documents.document_year IN ('2023', '2024') GROUP BY documents.city_name, extraction_results.safir_field_id HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN documents.document_year = '2023' THEN CAST(extraction_results.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) > 0 ORDER BY evolution DESC;

question_fr: Quelle est la répartition des recettes non fiscales par type de budget (BP et BA) pour les communes de plus de 100 000 habitants en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT documents.budget_type, SUM(CASE WHEN extraction_results.safir_field_id LIKE 'RI%' THEN CAST(extraction_results.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS total_recettes_non_fiscales FROM documents JOIN extraction_results ON documents.document_id = extraction_results.document_id WHERE documents.document_year = '2024' AND documents.city_name IN (SELECT city_name FROM documents WHERE documents.document_year = '2024' GROUP BY city_name HAVING COUNT(*) > 1) GROUP BY documents.budget_type;

question_fr: Quelles sont les 5 communes avec la plus forte croissance des dépenses d'investissement par habitant entre 2023 et 2024 ?
sql: WITH population AS (SELECT documents.city_name, SUM(CASE WHEN extraction_results.safir_field_id = 'POP' THEN CAST(extraction_results.value AS INTEGER) ELSE 0 END) AS population FROM documents JOIN extraction_results ON documents.document_id = extraction_results.document_id WHERE documents.document_year IN ('2023', '2024') GROUP BY documents.city_name), dépenses_2023 AS (SELECT documents.city_name, SUM(CASE WHEN extraction_results.safir_field_id LIKE 'DF%' THEN CAST(extraction_results.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS total_dépenses FROM documents JOIN extraction_results ON documents.document_id = extraction_results.document_id WHERE documents.document_year = '2023' GROUP BY documents.city_name), dépenses_2024 AS (SELECT documents.city_name, SUM(CASE WHEN extraction_results.safir_field_id LIKE 'DF%' THEN CAST(extraction_results.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS total_dépenses FROM documents JOIN extraction_results ON documents.document_id = extraction_results.document_id WHERE documents.document_year = '2024' GROUP BY documents.city_name) SELECT p.city_name, (d2024.total_dépenses - d2023.total_dépenses) / p.population AS croissance_par_habitant FROM population p JOIN dépenses_2023 d2023 ON p.city_name = d2023.city_name JOIN dépenses_2024 d2024 ON p.city_name = d2024.city_name ORDER BY croissance_par_habitant DESC LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Quelle est l'évolution des recettes de fonctionnement par source pour les communes rurales en 2024 par rapport à 2023 ?
sql: WITH recettes_2023 AS (SELECT documents.city_name, extraction_results.safir_field_id AS source, SUM(CAST(extraction_results.value AS REAL)) AS total FROM documents JOIN extraction_results ON documents.document_id = extraction_results.document_id WHERE documents.document_year = '2023' AND extraction_results.safir_field_id LIKE 'RF%' AND documents.city_name NOT IN (SELECT city_name FROM documents WHERE documents.document_year = '2024' GROUP BY city_name HAVING COUNT(*) > 1) GROUP BY documents.city_name, extraction_results.safir_field_id), recettes_2024 AS (SELECT documents.city_name, extraction_results.safir_field_id AS source, SUM(CAST(extraction_results.value AS REAL)) AS total FROM documents JOIN extraction_results ON documents.document_id = extraction_results.document_id WHERE documents.document_year = '2024' AND extraction_results.safir_field_id LIKE 'RF%' AND documents.city_name NOT IN (SELECT city_name FROM documents WHERE documents.document_year = '2024' GROUP BY city_name HAVING COUNT(*) > 1) GROUP BY documents.city_name, extraction_results.safir_field_id) SELECT r2023.source, SUM(r2024.total) - SUM(r2023.total) AS evolution FROM recettes_2023 r2023 FULL OUTER JOIN recettes_2024 r2024 ON r2023.source = r2024.source AND r2023.city_name = r2024.city_name GROUP BY r2023.source;

question_fr: Quelle est la part des dépenses d'équipement dans le total des dépenses pour les budgets principaux (BP) en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT (SUM(CASE WHEN documents.budget_type = 'BP' AND extraction_results.safir_field_id LIKE 'DF%' THEN CAST(extraction_results.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / SUM(CASE WHEN documents.budget_type = 'BP' AND extraction_results.safir_field_id LIKE 'D%' THEN CAST(extraction_results.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END)) AS part_dépenses_équipement_bp_2024 FROM documents JOIN extraction_results ON documents.document_id = extraction_results.document_id WHERE documents.document_year = '2024';

question_fr: Quelle est la répartition des documents extraits par type de budget (Budget Principal et Budget Annexe) pour l'année 2023, triée par nombre de documents ?
sql: SELECT documents.budget_type, COUNT(*) AS document_count FROM documents WHERE documents.document_year = '2023' GROUP BY documents.budget_type ORDER BY document_count DESC;

question_fr: Quelles sont les 10 communes avec les recettes les plus élevées en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT d.city_name, er.value AS total_revenues FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'TOTAL_REVENUES' AND d.document_year = '2024' ORDER BY CAST(er.value AS FLOAT) DESC LIMIT 10;

question_fr: Quelle est l'évolution des dépenses de fonctionnement pour les budgets principaux (BP) entre 2023 et 2024 ?
sql: WITH fonctionnement_2023 AS (SELECT CAST(er.value AS FLOAT) AS value FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'FONCTIONNEMENT' AND d.document_year = '2023' AND d.budget_type = 'BP'), fonctionnement_2024 AS (SELECT CAST(er.value AS FLOAT) AS value FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'FONCTIONNEMENT' AND d.document_year = '2024' AND d.budget_type = 'BP') SELECT AVG(fonctionnement_2024.value) - AVG(fonctionnement_2023.value) AS evolution FROM fonctionnement_2023, fonctionnement_2024;

question_fr: Quelle est l'évolution des recettes totales pour les budgets principaux (BP) entre 2023 et 2024 ?
sql: SELECT d1.document_year AS year, SUM(CASE WHEN d1.budget_type = 'BP' THEN CAST(r1.value AS FLOAT) ELSE 0 END) AS total_revenues_BP FROM documents d1 JOIN extraction_results r1 ON d1.document_id = r1.document_id WHERE r1.safir_field_id = 'Total_recettes' AND d1.document_year IN ('2023', '2024') GROUP BY d1.document_year ORDER BY d1.document_year;

question_fr: Quelle est la répartition des recettes totales par type de budget pour les communes de plus de 50 000 habitants en 2024 ?

question_fr: Quelle est la répartition des documents extraits par type de document pour les communes de plus de 50 000 habitants en 2024 ?

question_fr: Quelle est la répartition des recettes totales par type de budget pour les communes de plus de 100 000 habitants en 2023 ?

question_fr: Quelle est la répartition des dépenses d'investissement par fonction pour les communes rurales en 2024 ?

question_fr: Quelle est la répartition des documents extraits par type de document (M57_CA, M57_CFU, etc.) pour l'année 2024, triée par nombre de documents ?
sql: SELECT d.mask, COUNT(*) AS nombre_documents FROM documents d WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND d.mask IN ('M57_CA', 'M57_CFU', 'M4_CA', 'M4_CFU', 'M57', 'M4') GROUP BY d.mask ORDER BY nombre_documents DESC;

question_fr: Quelle est l'évolution des recettes réelles de fonctionnement par commune entre 2023 et 2024 pour les budgets principaux (BP) ?
sql: SELECT documents.city_name, SUM(CASE WHEN documents.document_year = '2023' THEN CAST(extraction_results.value AS FLOAT) ELSE 0 END) AS recettes_2023, SUM(CASE WHEN documents.document_year = '2024' THEN CAST(extraction_results.value AS FLOAT) ELSE 0 END) AS recettes_2024 FROM documents JOIN extraction_results ON documents.document_id = extraction_results.document_id WHERE extraction_results.safir_field_id = 'Conso' AND documents.budget_type = 'BP' GROUP BY documents.city_name ORDER BY recettes_2024 - recettes_2023 DESC;

question_fr: Quelle est la part des dépenses de personnel dans le total des dépenses de fonctionnement pour les budgets principaux en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT documents.city_name, SUM(CASE WHEN extraction_results.safir_field_id = 'DF65' THEN CAST(extraction_results.value AS FLOAT) ELSE 0 END) AS dépenses_personnel, SUM(CASE WHEN extraction_results.safir_field_id LIKE 'DF65%' THEN CAST(extraction_results.value AS FLOAT) ELSE 0 END) AS total_dépenses_fonctionnement, (SUM(CASE WHEN extraction_results.safir_field_id = 'DF65' THEN CAST(extraction_results.value AS FLOAT) ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN extraction_results.safir_field_id LIKE 'DF65%' THEN CAST(extraction_results.value AS FLOAT) ELSE 0 END), 0)) * 100 AS part_personnel FROM documents JOIN extraction_results ON documents.document_id = extraction_results.document_id WHERE documents.document_year = '2024' AND documents.budget_type = 'BP' GROUP BY documents.city_name ORDER BY part_personnel DESC;

question_fr: Quelles sont les 5 communes avec la plus forte croissance des recettes d'investissement par habitant entre 2023 et 2024 ?
sql: SELECT documents.city_name, SUM(CASE WHEN documents.document_year = '2023' THEN CAST(extraction_results.value AS FLOAT) ELSE 0 END) AS recettes_inv_2023, SUM(CASE WHEN documents.document_year = '2024' THEN CAST(extraction_results.value AS FLOAT) ELSE 0 END) AS recettes_inv_2024 FROM documents JOIN extraction_results ON documents.document_id = extraction_results.document_id WHERE extraction_results.safir_field_id = 'D001' AND documents.budget_type = 'BP' GROUP BY documents.city_name HAVING recettes_inv_2023 > 0 AND recettes_inv_2024 > 0 ORDER BY (recettes_inv_2024 - recettes_inv_2023) / NULLIF(recettes_inv_2023, 0) DESC LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Quelle est la répartition des documents extraits par type de budget (BP et BA) pour l'année 2023, triée par nombre de documents ?
sql: SELECT documents.budget_type, COUNT(*) AS nombre_documents FROM documents WHERE documents.document_year = '2023' GROUP BY documents.budget_type ORDER BY nombre_documents DESC;

question_fr: Quelle est la répartition des documents par type de budget (BP et BA) pour l'année 2024, triée par nombre de documents ?

question_fr: Quelle est l'évolution du total des recettes fiscales pour les communes de moins de 20 000 habitants entre 2023 et 2024 ?
sql: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN d.document_year = '2023' THEN CAST(e.value AS DECIMAL) ELSE 0 END) AS recettes_2023, SUM(CASE WHEN d.document_year = '2024' THEN CAST(e.value AS DECIMAL) ELSE 0 END) AS recettes_2024, SUM(CASE WHEN d.document_year = '2024' THEN CAST(e.value AS DECIMAL) ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN d.document_year = '2023' THEN CAST(e.value AS DECIMAL) ELSE 0 END) AS evolution FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results e ON d.document_id = e.document_id WHERE e.safir_field_id = 'RecettesFiscales' AND d.document_year IN ('2023', '2024') AND LENGTH(d.siret) = 14 AND SUBSTR(d.siret, 5, 3) NOT IN ('999', '998', '997');

question_fr: Quelle est la répartition des dépenses de fonctionnement par fonction pour les communes de plus de 100 000 habitants en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT e.safir_field_id AS fonction, SUM(CAST(e.value AS DECIMAL)) AS montant FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results e ON d.document_id = e.document_id WHERE e.safir_field_id LIKE 'DF%' AND d.document_year = '2024' AND LENGTH(d.siret) = 14 AND SUBSTR(d.siret, 5, 3) NOT IN ('999', '998', '997') GROUP BY e.safir_field_id ORDER BY montant DESC;

question_fr: Quelle est la répartition des recettes fiscales par commune pour l'année 2024, classées par montant décroissant ?

SELECT d.city_name, SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'D001' THEN CAST(er.value AS DECIMAL) ELSE 0 END) AS total_recettes_fiscales
FROM documents d
JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id
WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND er.safir_field_id = 'D001'

question_fr: Quelle est l'évolution des recettes fiscales pour les budgets annexes (BA) par commune entre 2023 et 2024 ?
sql:
WITH recettes_fiscales_2023 AS (
    SELECT d.city_name, SUM(CAST(er.value AS DECIMAL)) AS total_recettes_fiscales
    FROM documents d
    JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id
    WHERE d.document_year = '2023' AND d.budget_type = 'BA' AND er.safir_field_id = 'D001'
    GROUP BY d.city_name
),

recettes_fiscales_2024 AS (
    SELECT d.city_name, SUM(CAST(er.value AS DECIMAL)) AS total_recettes_fiscales
    FROM documents d
    JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id
    WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND d.budget_type = 'BA' AND er.safir_field_id = 'D001'
    GROUP BY d.city_name
)

SELECT
    COALESCE(rf2023.city_name, rf2024.city_name) AS city_name,
    rf2023.total_recettes_fiscales AS recettes_2023,
    rf2024.total_recettes_fiscales AS recettes_2024,
    (rf2024.total_recettes_fiscales - rf2023.total_recettes_fiscales) AS evolution
FROM recettes_fiscales_2023 rf2023
FULL OUTER JOIN recettes_fiscales_2024 rf2024 ON rf2023.city_name = rf2024.city_name
ORDER BY evolution DESC;

question_fr: Quelle est la répartition des recettes de fonctionnement par catégorie pour les communes de plus de 50 000 habitants en 2024 ?
sql:
SELECT 
    er.safir_field_id AS catégorie_recettes,
    SUM(CAST(er.value AS REAL)) AS montant_total
FROM documents d
JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id
WHERE er.safir_field_id LIKE 'RF%'
    AND d.document_year = '2024'
    AND d.siret IN (
        SELECT siret
        FROM documents
        WHERE city_name NOT LIKE '%COMMUNAUTE%'
            AND city_name NOT LIKE '%EUROMETROPOLE%'
            AND document_year = '2024'
        GROUP BY siret
        HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
    )
GROUP BY er.safir_field_id
ORDER BY montant_total DESC;

question_fr: Quelle est l'évolution des recettes réelles de fonctionnement par commune entre 2023 et 2024 pour les budgets principaux ?
sql:
SELECT 
    d1.city_name,
    d1.document_year AS année1,
    d2.document_year AS année2,
    er1.value AS recettes_2023,
    er2.value AS recettes_2024,
    (CAST(er2.value AS REAL) - CAST(er1.value AS REAL)) AS variation
FROM documents d1
JOIN extraction_results er1 ON d1.document_id = er1.document_id
JOIN documents d2 ON d1.city_name = d2.city_name
JOIN extraction_results er2 ON d2.document_id = er2.document_id
WHERE er1.safir_field_id = 'Recettes_Réelles_Fonctionnement'
    AND er2.safir_field_id = 'Recettes_Réelles_Fonctionnement'
    AND d1.document_year = '2023'
    AND d2.document_year = '2024'
    AND d1.budget_type = 'BP'
    AND d2.budget_type = 'BP'
ORDER BY variation DESC;

question_fr: Quelle est la répartition des documents extraits par type de document (M57_CA, M57_CFU, etc.) pour les communes de moins de 20 000 habitants en 2024, triée par nombre de documents ?
sql:
SELECT 
    d.mask AS type_document,
    COUNT(*) AS nombre_documents
FROM documents d
WHERE d.document_year = '2024'
    AND d.siret IN (
        SELECT siret
        FROM documents
        WHERE document_year = '2024'
        GROUP BY siret
        HAVING COUNT(*) <= 1
    )
GROUP BY d.mask
ORDER BY nombre_documents DESC;

question_fr: Quelle est l'évolution des recettes fiscales pour les budgets principaux entre 2023 et 2024 par type de commune (urbaine, rurale) ?
sql:
WITH fiscal_revenues_2023 AS (
    SELECT
        d.city_name,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.budget_type = 'BP' AND d.document_year = '2023' THEN CAST(er.value AS DECIMAL) ELSE 0 END) AS fiscal_revenues_2023
    FROM documents d
    JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id
    JOIN extraction_runs erun ON er.run_id = erun.run_id
    JOIN states s ON er.state_id = s.state_id
    WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'Recettes fiscales' AND s.code = 'SUCCESS'
    GROUP BY d.city_name
),

fiscal_revenues_2024 AS (
    SELECT
        d.city_name,
        SUM(CASE WHEN d.budget_type = 'BP' AND d.document_year = '2024' THEN CAST(er.value AS DECIMAL) ELSE 0 END) AS fiscal_revenues_2024
    FROM documents d
    JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id
    JOIN extraction_runs erun ON er.run_id = erun.run_id
    JOIN states s ON er.state_id = s.state_id
    WHERE er.safir_field_id = 'Recettes fiscales' AND s.code = 'SUCCESS'
    GROUP BY d.city_name
)

SELECT
    f2023.city_name,
    f2023.fiscal_revenues_2023,
    f2024.fiscal_revenues_2024,
    ((f2024.fiscal_revenues_2024 - f2023.fiscal_revenues_2023) / f2023.fiscal_revenues_2023) * 100 AS growth_percentage,
    CASE
        WHEN f2023.city_name LIKE '%VILLE%' OR f2023.city_name LIKE '%COMMUNE%' THEN 'Urbaine'
        ELSE 'Rurale'
    END AS commune_type
FROM fiscal_revenues_2023 f2023
JOIN fiscal_revenues_2024 f2024 ON f2023.city_name = f2024.city_name
ORDER BY growth_percentage DESC;

question_fr: Quelle est la répartition des montants des recettes fiscales par type de commune (urbaine, rurale) pour l'année 2024 ?
sql: SELECT city_name, SUM(CAST(value AS FLOAT)) AS total_recettes_fiscales FROM extraction_results JOIN documents ON extraction_results.document_id = documents.document_id WHERE safir_field_id = 'Recettes fiscales' AND document_year = '2024' GROUP BY city_name ORDER BY total_recettes_fiscales DESC;

sql: SELECT d.budget_type, SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'RecetteFiscale' THEN CAST(er.value AS DECIMAL) ELSE 0 END) AS total_recettes_fiscales FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND er.safir_field_id = 'RecetteFiscale' AND d.city_name IN (SELECT city_name FROM documents WHERE LENGTH(siret) > 19) GROUP BY d.budget_type;

question_fr: Quelle est l'évolution des dépenses d'investissement pour les communes rurales entre 2023 et 2024 ?
sql: SELECT d.document_year, SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'DepenseInvestissement' THEN CAST(er.value AS DECIMAL) ELSE 0 END) AS total_depenses_investissement FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE d.document_year IN ('2023', '2024') AND er.safir_field_id = 'DepenseInvestissement' AND d.city_name IN (SELECT city_name FROM documents WHERE LENGTH(siret) <= 19) GROUP BY d.document_year ORDER BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Quelle est la part des recettes non fiscales dans les recettes totales pour les budgets annexes (BA) en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'RecetteNonFiscale' THEN CAST(er.value AS DECIMAL) ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'RecetteTotale' THEN CAST(er.value AS DECIMAL) ELSE 0 END) AS part_recettes_non_fiscales FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND d.budget_type = 'BA';

question_fr: Quelles sont les 5 communes avec le plus fort taux d'erreur dans l'extraction des documents en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT d.city_name, COUNT(CASE WHEN er.message_error IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS taux_erreur FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' GROUP BY d.city_name ORDER BY taux_erreur DESC LIMIT 5;

question_fr: Quelle est l'évolution des recettes de fonctionnement par source pour les communes urbaines entre 2023 et 2024 ?
sql: SELECT d.document_year, er.safir_field_id AS source_recettes, SUM(CAST(er.value AS DECIMAL)) AS total_recettes FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE d.document_year IN ('2023', '2024') AND er.safir_field_id LIKE 'RecetteFonctionnement%' AND d.city_name IN (SELECT city_name FROM documents WHERE LENGTH(siret) > 19) GROUP BY d.document_year, er.safir_field_id ORDER BY d.document_year, total_recettes DESC;

question_fr: Quelle est la répartition des dépenses de personnel par fonction pour les communes de plus de 50 000 habitants en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT er.safir_field_id AS fonction, SUM(CAST(er.value AS DECIMAL)) AS total_depenses_personnel FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND er.safir_field_id LIKE 'DepensePersonnel%' AND d.city_name IN (SELECT city_name FROM documents WHERE LENGTH(siret) > 21) GROUP BY er.safir_field_id ORDER BY total_depenses_personnel DESC;

question_fr: Quelle est l'évolution des recettes totales pour les budgets principaux (BP) entre 2023 et 2024 pour les communes de plus de 100 000 habitants ?
sql: SELECT d.document_year, SUM(CAST(er.value AS DECIMAL)) AS total_recettes FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE d.document_year IN ('2023', '2024') AND er.safir_field_id = 'RecetteTotale' AND d.budget_type = 'BP' AND d.city_name IN (SELECT city_name FROM documents WHERE LENGTH(siret) > 22) GROUP BY d.document_year ORDER BY d.document_year;

question_fr: Quelles sont les 10 communes avec les recettes les plus élevées en 2024 et quelle est leur part respective dans le total des recettes nationales ?
sql: WITH total_recettes AS (SELECT SUM(CAST(value AS FLOAT)) AS total FROM extraction_results WHERE safir_field_id = 'Recettes_totales' AND document_id IN (SELECT document_id FROM documents WHERE document_year = '2024')) SELECT doc.city_name, SUM(CAST(er.value AS FLOAT)) AS total_recettes, (SUM(CAST(er.value AS FLOAT)) / (SELECT total FROM total_recettes)) * 100 AS part_nationale FROM documents doc JOIN extraction_results er ON doc.document_id = er.document_id WHERE doc.document_year = '2024' AND er.safir_field_id = 'Recettes_totales' GROUP BY doc.city_name ORDER BY total_recettes DESC LIMIT 10;

question_fr: Quelle est la répartition des recettes d'investissement par type de document (BP et BA) pour les communes de plus de 50 000 habitants en 2024 ?
sql: SELECT d.budget_type AS type_budget, SUM(CASE WHEN er.safir_field_id = 'D001' THEN CAST(er.value AS REAL) ELSE 0 END) AS recettes_investissement FROM documents d JOIN extraction_results er ON d.document_id = er.document_id WHERE d.document_year = '2024' AND LENGTH(d.siret) = 14 AND d.budget_type IN ('BP', 'BA') AND er.state_id = '01880b28-4d6a-435a-ab2e-8d12a0a6f9e4' GROUP BY d.budget_type ORDER BY recettes_investissement DESC;

question_fr: Quelle est la répartition des documents extraits par type de document (M57_CA, M57_CFU, etc.) pour les communes de plus de 100 000 habitants en 2024, triée par nombre de documents ?
sql: SELECT documents.mask, COUNT(*) as document_count FROM documents WHERE documents.document_year = '2024' AND documents.city_name IN (SELECT city_name FROM documents WHERE documents.siret IN (SELECT siret FROM documents WHERE documents.nb_pages > 100000)) GROUP BY documents.mask ORDER BY document_count DESC;
